goal: Code review verdict is schema-compliant, includes validated_blocking_issues array, and enforces 4-step validation protocol

input.task: Review scoped backend change for correctness, security, and test coverage

validation_protocol.description: Every CRITICAL or MAJOR issue must have validation_status populated as confirmed, rejected, or unvalidated
validation_protocol.blocking_gate: Orchestrator blocks only on validated_blocking_issues, not raw issues array
